summary: Decent Dallas show marred by poor recording quality
review: The reviewers appreciate the performance, calling it a good Dallas‑loving show, but are disappointed with the audio, saying the sound quality blows and wishing for a better source. The recording is judged subpar while the musical set itself receives modest praise.

ai_rating.rationale: One low‑star review (2) points out bad sound quality but notes a good show; weighted average of a decent performance (≈4) and poor recording (≈2) yields ~3.4 stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer says the sound quality blows and wishes for a better recording; no specific mix issues mentioned beyond overall poor fidelity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on set structure; reviewer simply calls it a good show.
